title: Admissions
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Admissions
Strategic Location
Our strategic location in the heart of China’s most international city enables students to make connections throughout Asia, while earning a degree from New York University, among the top universities in the United States and the world.
Innovative Programs
Innovative academic programs offer students a world-class education, delivering the best elements of American higher education in a Chinese setting. Undergraduates pursue a four-year program rooted in the liberal arts and sciences while numerous postgraduate offerings span a variety of disciplines.
Renowned Faculty
World-renowned faculty mentor students both in the classroom and at NYU Shanghai’s leading research institutes. Our 1:8 faculty-to-student ratio and small class sizes ensure that students can build strong relationships with their professors.
International Student Body
Our international student body representing more than 70 countries and 30 provinces in China – creates opportunities for students to gain the skills to work and thrive in multicultural environments and to master English and Chinese.
A Global Network
NYU’s global network provides students with diverse international study experiences, whether in New York or 12 other NYU global hubs. Upon graduation, NYU Shanghai students join a worldwide network of 500,000 NYU alumni.
Undergraduate
Graduate
Visiting Students

text_blocks.text: Our strategic location in the heart of China’s most international city enables students to make connections throughout Asia, while earning a degree from New York University, among the top universities in the United States and the world.

Innovative academic programs offer students a world-class education, delivering the best elements of American higher education in a Chinese setting. Undergraduates pursue a four-year program rooted in the liberal arts and sciences while numerous postgraduate offerings span a variety of disciplines.

World-renowned faculty mentor students both in the classroom and at NYU Shanghai’s leading research institutes. Our 1:8 faculty-to-student ratio and small class sizes ensure that students can build strong relationships with their professors.

Our international student body representing more than 70 countries and 30 provinces in China – creates opportunities for students to gain the skills to work and thrive in multicultural environments and to master English and Chinese.

NYU’s global network provides students with diverse international study experiences, whether in New York or 12 other NYU global hubs. Upon graduation, NYU Shanghai students join a worldwide network of 500,000 NYU alumni.
